greeting.line: It's not about the faction. Well. It's not ONLY about the faction. Walk with me?
greeting.line_friendly: Walk with me. Report later — or never.
greeting.line_hostile: Recruitment's off. So is the charm.

lore.line: They told me to recruit you. I told them it was going well. It IS going well — just not the way I report it. We're both in trouble, aren't we.
